ARG vs ALG.odds_summary: Argentina was a heavy favorite around -260, Algeria around +800, draw around +360; Over 2.5 was near even and BTTS Yes was a plus-money underdog.
audit_notes: Argentina-win and Argentina-scoring anchors were externally supported.
Algeria second-half scoring and BTTS-style outcomes were reasonable low-to-mid probability NO leans.

ESPN Algeria vs Argentina match page

AUT vs JOR.odds_summary: Austria was a heavy favorite around -270, Jordan around +750, draw around +425; Over 2.5 was favored around -135 and BTTS Yes was close to even.
audit_notes: Austria-win and 3+ goals outcomes were strongly supported by pre-match market context.
Jordan scoring was not a shock given BTTS Yes was near even.

sources.title: FOX Sports Austria vs Jordan odds
ESPN Jordan vs Austria match page

CZE vs RSA.odds_summary: Czechia was only a mild favorite, roughly +100 to -122 depending on book/source; South Africa was around +300 to +376, and Under 2.5 was favored.
CZE vs RSA.result_summary: Czechia and South Africa drew 1-1, with South Africa equalizing late by penalty.
audit_notes: The Czechia-win miss was not a huge favorite failure; the market treated this as relatively balanced.
Penalty/red and second-half scoring markets were plausible 40-45% events that happened.
Concrete foul-rate evidence pointed against a generic underdog-fouls-more prior.

sources.title: Oddschecker Czech Republic vs South Africa odds
facts: Czech Republic was near +100, draw near +230, South Africa near +300.

sources.title: Covers Czechia vs South Africa odds
facts: Czechia was listed around -122, South Africa around +376, draw around +285.

sources.title: FootyStats Czech Republic vs South Africa team stats
facts: Pre-match team-rate page showed Czechia committing more fouls per match than South Africa.

sources.title: Guardian Czechia vs South Africa live report
facts: South Africa equalized late by penalty in a 1-1 draw.

ENG vs CRO.odds_summary: England was favored around -140, Croatia around +420, draw around +270; Under 2.5 was favored around -142 but BTTS Yes was only slightly plus-money.
audit_notes: The 4-2 score was high-event relative to the main total, but BTTS Yes and Over 2.5 were not extreme tails.
Our BTTS-and-3-plus-goals forecast at 32% was probably low but not absurd.
Penalty/red YES was a moderately unlikely event, not a black swan.

sources.title: FOX Sports England vs Croatia odds
The Analyst England vs Croatia stats
ESPN England vs Croatia live story

FRA vs SEN.odds_summary: France was a major tournament favorite and group favorite; direct match moneyline was not captured in the saved public-source set.
audit_notes: France-win and France-scoring priors were externally supported by broader market context.
The France first-half scoring miss and Senegal card miss require direct market/prop lines before treating them as systematic.

GHA vs PAN.odds_summary: Ghana was only a slight favorite around +127 to +130, Panama around +220 to +245, draw around +220 to +245; Under 2.5 was materially favored.
GHA vs PAN.result_summary: Ghana beat Panama 1-0 in a low-event match.
audit_notes: Ghana-win was directionally right, but not a large edge.
Ghana 3-plus shots on target at 67% was too high for a slight favorite in an under-leaning match without a direct SOT line.
Low total SOT context supports the broader stat-prop overconfidence finding.

sources.title: FOX Sports Ghana vs Panama odds
Covers Ghana vs Panama odds
facts: Ghana was around +127, Panama around +245, draw around +245.

sources.title: FanSided Ghana vs Panama stats
facts: A total shots-on-target market of 9-plus resolved at 6.

IRQ vs NOR.odds_summary: Norway was a very heavy favorite around -600, Iraq around +1400, draw around +600; Over 2.5 was favored and BTTS Yes was plus-money but not remote.
audit_notes: Norway-win and high-total directions were externally supported.
Iraq scoring at 39% was market-consistent rather than an obviously bad low forecast.
The second-half SOT miss reflects event-volume instability more than match-result direction.

sources.title: FOX Sports Iraq vs Norway odds
ESPN Norway vs Iraq match page
Guardian Iraq vs Norway live report
facts: Iraq equalized before Norway pulled away to win 4-1.

POR vs COD.odds_summary: Portugal was a heavy favorite around -350, DR Congo around +1000, draw around +420; Over 2.5 was favored and BTTS No was favored.
audit_notes: Portugal-win at 77% was close to public market implication, so the result was a bookmaker-consensus miss.
The sharper bot-specific miss was favorite-control volume: Portugal second-half SOT dominance was overconfident.
Ramos anytime scoring was correctly kept low relative to Ronaldo and team-level scoring context.

sources.title: FOX Sports Portugal vs DR Congo odds
AS Portugal vs DR Congo live stats
facts: Portugal had very low shot and shot-on-target output despite being favored.

sources.title: Guardian Portugal vs DR Congo live report

UZB vs COL.odds_summary: Colombia was a heavy favorite; public snippets showed Colombia around -316 to -1.5 favorite territory, with Uzbekistan a long underdog.
audit_notes: Colombia-win and over directions were externally supported.
Uzbekistan scoring at 35% was not an extreme tail for a 3-1 match profile, but our under/low-total lean was too conservative.
Second-half SOT-control props again showed high volatility.

sources.title: FOX Sports Uzbekistan vs Colombia boxscore odds tab
facts: The page displayed Colombia winning as a -316 favorite.
